programs.title: Hoarders
programs.desc: Because all the clutter is actually valuable, Forrest and the Hoarders team of experts are pushed to the limit to save Forrest's home, resolve his financial crisis, and make space for Forrest to live.

programs.title: 24 Hours In Emergency
programs.desc: 50-year-old Sara is rushed to St George's having suffered a thunderclap headache, while 13-year-old Flynn is in Paediatrics having bullseyed a car windscreen when hit while riding his bike.

programs.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programs.desc: Paramedics respond to a serious fall from a ladder, a 10-year-old with a broken femur after a motocross accident, and a 53-year-old who has collapsed and is unresponsive.

programs.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programs.desc: Follow the investigation of the controversial crash of an El Al 747 into a high-rise Amsterdam apartment complex.

programs.title: Snapped
programs.desc: After a welfare check is called in on a 53-year-old Texas man, police soon discover him shot to death in a Louisiana swamp that's 450 miles from his home.

programs.title: A Plan To Kill
programs.desc: After a deadly shooting in Deltona, Florida, police investigate a young man's murder, digging into the couple's past to uncover who would want to end their future before it began.
